0.title: ThrottledEvents Sum (by Region and APIName)
0.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries throttled_events_sum_by_region_apiname = avg(cloud.aws.states.throttled_events_sum_by_region_apiname), by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| sort arrayAvg(throttled_events_sum_by_region_apiname) desc
| limit 20

1.title: ConsumedCapacity Sum (by Region and APIName)
1.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries consumed_capacity_sum_by_region_apiname = avg(cloud.aws.states.consumed_capacity_sum_by_region_apiname), by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| sort arrayAvg(consumed_capacity_sum_by_region_apiname) desc
| limit 20
